findings.evidence: PR line 41 fixes `[AddCommGroup 𝕜]`; Mathlib has `QuotientGroup.mk'` and `eq_iff_div_mem` for `[Group G] (N : Subgroup G) [N.Normal]` at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/QuotientGroup/Defs.lean:88` and `:145-148`.
findings.fix: State the quotient result for `[Group G] [IsTopologicalGroup G] (H : Subgroup G) [H.Normal]` using left translations, or the additive `[AddGroup 𝕜] [H.Normal]` analogue with `Homeomorph.addLeft`; then derive the commutative/right-translation AddCircle corollaries.
findings.issue: The quotient deck API assumes `[AddCommGroup 𝕜]`, even though Mathlib's quotient-map API is for noncommutative groups with a normal subgroup; this makes the new general theorem unusable for ordinary topological group quotients.

summary: The AddCircle specialization is now derived from a quotient-map theorem, but that new quotient theorem is still stated below the natural group-theoretic level.
